ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster the country belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country associated with the metrics */,
  "new_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of new COVID-19 cases per million residents */,
  "new_deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of new COVID-19 deaths per million residents */,
  "reproduction_rate" REAL /* Reproduction rate of the virus */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive test results */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalization due to COVID-19 */,
  "icu_occupancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of ICU occupancy due to COVID-19 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria for grouping countries */,
  "criterion" TEXT /* Specific criterion used for clustering (e.g., cases per million, reproduction rate) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source providing the metrics */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided (e.g., cases, deaths, vaccination) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being recorded */,
  "recorded_on" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of API key expiration */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted by the API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the content belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric in the report */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the health metric in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
